roots: A portmanteau of 'proscenium' (the stage arch) and 'docent' (a museum guide)
definition: The specific ego-anxiety of introducing two disparate friends; characterized by a breathless pride as the interaction begins, followed immediately by a compulsive need to over-explain and guide their conversation to ensure your taste in people is validated.
example: Caught in a sudden wave of procentia, she spent the first ten minutes of the dinner party frantically translating Mark's dry sarcasm just to guarantee her sister would understand why she liked him.

definition: The quiet grace of manipulating a physical object to erase your own presence; specifically, fully depressing a door handle before closing it to suppress the latch-click, ensuring the peace of those inside remains unbroken.
example: He stepped into the hallway, engaging in a brief moment of latentia as he held the brass handle down, riding it slowly back into place so the midnight quiet wouldn't shatter.
